reviews.review_description: Fun and entertaining. Like the challenge.

reviews.review_title: Didn't really live up to expectations
reviews.review_description:
I like the concept. It's an age old mobile game but with a bit of life. I find it to be a big buggy though.
Sometimes the auto aim is there and other times it's not. This changes between shots and is not dependent on whether I turn the level intensity up or not. The pause menu only allows me to return to the lobby (sometimes) the other options don't select, but instead they fire a ball through the menu. 
I wasn't surprised to see it on sale so soon after release.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review and feedback. We really appreciate it.! And we apologize for the issue with auto aim and the pause menu. The auto-aim feature was recently added to the casual mode, and we agree that it needs some fine tuning. We will also address the pause menu issue asap. You can expect an update to address these over the next week. We're also working on additional content for the game.

reviews.review_description: Found it calming as well as entertaining . Each level has been a stimulating brain teaser. Really enjoyed being able to play competitively against my family and friends near and far.￼ Well worth the purchase. ￼
Great variety of puzzles, and I like the music. Good challenge level.
